ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-09-2004 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE DEC-26-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE MAR-11-2004.

ARBITRATOR ROBERT JOSEPH BROWN APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION MAR-12-2004 THROUGH JUN-10-2004.

DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-12-2004 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
